incidents.title: Iran says it is closing strait of Hormuz over Israeli strikes in Lebanon

Dubai Supreme Council of Energy, Dubai Electricity and Water Authority (DEWA) and the World Green Economy Organization (WGEO) are to organise the 12th edition of the World Green Economy Summit (WGES) on 21-22 October 2026 at the Dubai World Trade Centre. This year’s theme is ‘From Success to Scale: Showcasing the Green Economy’. The summit will bring together decision-makers, business leaders, investors and experts in resilience and infrastructure, along with key representatives from government, the private sector and academia.
